verdict: A hair serum incorrectly listed in facial serum comparison—coconut oil is comedogenic for face and formula targets scalp/hair exclusively. Remove from consideration.

_research.name: Pacifica Coconut & Argan Smoothing Hair Serum
pros: Effective for hair shine and smoothing
_research.con: Completely unsuitable for facial use; coconut oil comedogenic risk and formula designed for hair, not face.
